arts.ttl: Man City crisis has echoes of Liverpool’s ‘bad champions’
arts.sum: In February 2021, Roy Keane famously called Liverpool ‘bad champions’ after they lost 4-1 to Man City in the Premier League. Jurgen Klopp’s side were in the midst of an extraordinary fall from grace. Having waltzed to their first title in 30 years with 99 points on the board the season beforehand, they were in […] The post Man City crisis has echoes of Liverpool’s ‘bad champions’ first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.sum: It is no secret that Olympique Lyonnais are open to selling players this January. Handed a provisional relegation to Ligue 2 by the DNCG, the club must satisfy authorities by…

arts.ttl: Everton and title winners make approach for same player – Toffees have ‘a lot to do’ for signing
arts.sum: Everton have joined the chase for Lyon’s Georges Mikautadze, according to a report from France. The forward joined Lyon from FC Metz in the summer and has been mainly used as a substitute. He managed seven goals and an assist from 21 games, and it includes nine starts for Lyon.
